Build-Depends: debhelper-compat (= 13), dh-sequence-gnome, desktop-file-utils, docbook-to-man, docbook-xsl, gnome-shell-common, gsettings-desktop-schemas-dev, itstool, libdconf-dev, libglib2.0-dev, libgtk-3-dev, libhandy-1-dev, libnautilus-extension-dev [amd64 arm64 armhf i386 loong64 ppc64el riscv64 s390x alpha hppa m68k powerpc ppc64], libpcre2-dev, libvte-2.91-dev (>= 0.84.0), libx11-dev, meson, perl, uuid-dev, xsltproc
Package-List: gnome-terminal deb gnome optional arch=any gnome-terminal-data deb gnome optional arch=all nautilus-extension-gnome-terminal deb gnome optional arch=alpha,amd64,arm64,armhf,hppa,i386,loong64,m68k,powerpc,ppc64,ppc64el,riscv64,s390x
